title: Home Barrier Evaluation/Removal Services * Older Adults - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Home Barrier Evaluation/Removal Services * Older Adults 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ALBANY AREA HABITAT FOR HUMANITY HOME REPAIR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance for low-income older adults and veterans who own their homes and are in need of urgent repairs to improve the health and safety of their living conditions. Examples of repairs include painting, landscaping, brush and junk removal, and siding repair. Program may also repair or replace windows, doors, and wheelchair ramps. PO Box 2400 Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Must be a veteran or an older adult with 30%-60% of HUD Median Income for Linn County Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon Email (541) 967-4030 Get Directions Visit Website More Details VOLUNTEER INTERFAITH CAREGIVERS OF CORVALLIS INC VOLUNTEER INTERFAITH CAREGIVERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with shopping and non-emergency medical transportation. Also can assist in the design and building of wheelchair ramps, chair platforms, stairs, and handrails. Appointments must be made at least 3 days prior to service. 501 NW 25th Street Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (541) 714-0820 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ALBANY AREA HABITAT FOR HUMANITY HOME REPAIR VOLUNTEER INTERFAITH CAREGIVERS OF CORVALLIS INC VOLUNTEER INTERFAITH CAREGIVERS
